HOME.title: परदुःखे दुःखित्वम्
HOME.intro: Feeling pain in the suffering of others
HOME.about-details: Navodayans Star Global Foundation is a humanitarian trust founded by the alumni of Jawahar Navodaya School, dedicated to serving society through compassion and action. We work to uplift underprivileged communities through medical camps, educational support, free tuition classes, youth sports motivation, anti-alcohol awareness drives, and support for poor families through free marriages. Our mission is to bring hope, dignity, and opportunities to every life we touch.
HOME.impact-details: We are proud to serve society through meaningful initiatives such as:

impact-points.title: Medical Camps in Rural Areas
impact-points.detail: We organise free medical camps in villages to provide health check-ups, medicines, consultations, and awareness about preventive healthcare. We believe that healthcare is a basic right, not a privilege.

impact-points.title: Anti-Alcohol Awareness Drives
impact-points.detail: Alcohol addiction destroys families, health, and futures. Through counselling sessions, awareness campaigns, and community engagement, we encourage people to choose healthier and more responsible lives.

impact-points.title: Youth Motivation Through Sports
impact-points.detail: Sports have the power to transform lives. We motivate young people to participate in sports and physical activities that build confidence, discipline, leadership, and teamwork while keeping them away from harmful influences.

impact-points.title: Educational Support & Scholarships
impact-points.detail: Many bright students are forced to give up their dreams because of financial difficulties. We provide scholarships, study materials, and educational assistance so that deserving students can continue their journey toward success.

impact-points.title: Free Marriages for Underprivileged Families
impact-points.detail: Marriage is one of life’s most special moments, yet many poor families struggle to bear its expenses. We help conduct free marriages with dignity and respect, bringing joy and relief to families in need.

impact-points.title: Free Education & Tuition Classes
impact-points.detail: Every child deserves the chance to learn. We arrange free tuition and learning support for children from weaker sections so they can build a better future through education.

ABOUT.title: About NSG Foundation
ABOUT.details:
Navodayans Star Global Foundation was founded with a heartfelt mission to serve humanity, uplift communities, and bring hope where it is needed the most. Created by the proud alumni of Jawahar Navodayan School, the foundation stands as a symbol of gratitude, responsibility, and the desire to give back to society.

We believe that success has true meaning only when it is shared with others. Inspired by the values we learned in school compassion, unity, discipline, and service we came together to create an organisation that could make a real difference in people’s lives. What began as a shared dream among former students has now grown into a movement dedicated to helping the underprivileged, empowering youth, and supporting families in need.

Across many villages and communities, especially in rural areas of Uttar Pradesh, countless people continue to face challenges such as lack of healthcare, limited educational opportunities, unemployment, addiction, and financial hardship. At Navodayans Star Global Foundation, we work with sincerity and dedication to address these issues through practical support and compassionate action.
